editions.leadTitleZh: 老年功能分层，不只看年龄和步速

editions.leadTitle: Randomised three-armed trial investigation of the Copenhagen Achilles tendon Rupture Treatment Algorithm (CARTA) for individualised treatment of acute Achilles tendon rupture
